text: I remember couple of years back I used to attend nearly all events in Nrb, every Friday and Saturday I had to be out somewhere. Couple of years later, I can now afford attending any social space in Nrb, but I have become too choosy, I don't want to spend time in spaces full of strangers who you will never meet again, I have redefined fun. Now I love linking out with friends and overlanding, going camping, Mt climbing, traveling etc Club's are suddenly too loud for me, I care about my safety too, fights in clubs where pple throw bottles and glasses at each other honestly scare me, peace is priceless to me now.
